clusters.title: Design doc describes a different log naming contract than the implementation

member_findings.title: Design doc describes a different log naming contract than the implementation
member_findings.impact: The spec says the command locates `<log-dir>/<address>.log`, but the new command and tests resolve `<log_filename>.INFO.log` under the worker log directory. Future maintainers will have two conflicting contracts in the same PR when changing log discovery or adding follow-up tests.
member_findings.fix: Update the design spec to describe the actual `log_dir` plus `log_filename`/process-name INFO log resolution, or change the implementation to match the documented address-based filename.
